icon_style: line-style flat icons in white on blue circular backgrounds
dark_slides_used_for: section headers and primary category labels within content cards
rules: Use orange (#E8500A) exclusively for slide titles and brand name; never for body text or backgrounds
Use blue (#0072BC) for section headers, card headers, and supporting UI elements like circles and banners
Always place a vertical dashed blue left-border accent on key bullet lists to create visual hierarchy
Pair every major text block with either an icon, illustration, or supporting diagram on the opposite side
Card-based layouts use a white or light background with a colored top-bar header in dark blue or teal
Bottom footer bar always contains a horizontal row of equal-width dark-blue tiles for engineering pillars or key themes
Maintain minimum 40px margin on all sides; internal card padding minimum 16px
Use chevron-style bullet (›) or gear icon bullets consistently; never mix with standard round bullets within same slide
All outcomes or summary rows must be visually distinguished with a blue left border or box outline in the accent color
